name: Trello
description: Create, change and delete boards and cards

endpoints.label: Create Attachment

fields.label: Card ID
fields.description: The ID of the card (provide the ID)

fields.label: Source URL
fields.description: The URL of the attachment to add

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: mimeType, name)

endpoints.description: Create a new attachment for a card

endpoints.label: Delete Attachment

fields.label: Card ID
fields.description: The ID of the card (provide the ID)

fields.label: Attachment ID
fields.description: The ID of the attachment to delete

endpoints.description: Delete an attachment

endpoints.label: Get Attachment

fields.label: Card ID
fields.description: The ID of the card (provide the ID)

fields.label: Attachment ID
fields.description: The ID of the attachment to get

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fields)

endpoints.description: Get the data of an attachment

endpoints.label: Get Many Attachment

fields.label: Card ID
fields.description: The ID of the card (provide the ID)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fields)

endpoints.description: Returns many attachments for the card

endpoints.label: Create Board

fields.label: Name
fields.description: The name of the board

fields.label: Description
fields.description: The description of the board

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: prefs_cardAging, prefs_background, prefs_comments, prefs_cardCovers, prefs_invitations, keepFromSource, defaultLabels, defaultLists, idOrganization, prefs_permissionLevel, powerUps, prefs_selfJoin, idBoardSource, prefs_voting)

endpoints.description: Create a new board

endpoints.label: Delete Board

fields.label: Board
fields.description: The ID of the board (provide the ID)

endpoints.description: Delete a board

endpoints.label: Get Board

fields.label: Board
fields.description: The ID of the board (provide the ID)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fields, pluginData)

endpoints.description: Get the data of a board

endpoints.label: Update Board

fields.label: Board
fields.description: The ID of the board (provide the ID)

fields.label: Update Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: closed, desc, name, idOrganization, subscribed)

endpoints.description: Update a board

endpoints.label: Add Board Member

fields.label: Board ID
fields.description: The ID of the board to add member to

fields.label: Member ID
fields.description: The ID of the member to add to the board

fields.label: Type
fields.description: Determines the type of membership the user being added should have

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: allowBillableGuest)

endpoints.description: Add member to board using member ID

endpoints.label: Get Many Board Member

fields.label: Board ID
fields.description: The ID of the board to get members from

fields.label: Return All
fields.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

fields.label: Limit
fields.description: Max number of results to return

endpoints.description: Get many members of a board

endpoints.label: Invite Board Member

fields.label: Board ID
fields.description: The ID of the board to invite member to

fields.label: Email
fields.description: The ID of the board to update

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: type, fullName)

endpoints.description: Invite a new member to a board via email

endpoints.label: Remove Board Member

fields.label: Board ID
fields.description: The ID of the board to remove member from

fields.label: Member ID
fields.description: The ID of the member to remove from the board

endpoints.description: Remove member from board using member ID

endpoints.label: Create Card

fields.label: List ID
fields.description: The ID of the list to create card in

fields.label: Name
fields.description: The name of the card

fields.label: Description
fields.description: The description of the card

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: due, dueComplete, pos, idMembers, idLabels, urlSource, idCardSource, keepFromSource)

endpoints.description: Create a new card

endpoints.label: Delete Card

fields.label: Card
fields.description: The ID of the card (provide the ID)

endpoints.description: Delete a card

endpoints.label: Get Card

fields.label: Card
fields.description: The ID of the card (provide the ID)

fields.label: Additional Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: fields, board, board_fields, customFieldItems, members, member_fields, pluginData, stickers, sticker_fields)

endpoints.description: Get the data of a card

endpoints.label: Update Card

fields.label: Card
fields.description: The ID of the card (provide the ID)

fields.label: Update Fields
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: idAttachmentCover, idBoard, closed, desc, due, dueComplete, idLabels, idList, idMembers, name, pos, subscribed)

endpoints.description: Update a card
